title: Fuel price hike and OMC profits: Are India’s oil firms really making windfall gains?
content: Recent fuel price hikes have ignited debate over oil marketing companies' (OMCs) profits amid the Middle East crisis. Despite a reported Rs 77,821 crore profit for FY26, a closer look reveals thin margins, past losses, and a lag in reflecting current crude price impacts.  These profits are crucial for investments and national energy security.

title: Workload (mis) management: Why IPL franchises need to do better
content: IPL's final league day exposed poor workload management as Jasprit Bumrah and Varun Chakravarthy played with injuries. Despite knowing about Bumrah's knee niggle, Mumbai Indians fielded him extensively. Ajinkya Rahane admitted Varun played with a hairline fracture after medical team clearance. Rajasthan Royals' Riyan Parag also revealed fitness issues, highlighting a concerning trend for Indian cricketers ahead of future assignments.

title: Eye on China, Pakistan: India plans major battlefield upgrade for ageing T-72 tanks
content: India's T-72 tanks, once cutting-edge, are undergoing a significant upgrade under Project Rhino, receiving new engines and advanced fire-control systems. This modernization aims to extend their service life beyond 2030. Meanwhile, the Indian Army has inducted its 1,000th T-90 tank, a successor based on the T-72 platform, bolstering its armored capabilities.

title: JP Morgan responds to order to pay $4 million to ex-employee fired over home business meeting
content: A Wall Street arbitration panel has ordered JP Morgan to pay former employee Ryan Bodner $4 million in damages, plus interest, for wrongful termination. Bodner was fired over an expense submission for a business meeting at his home, which the bank allegedly mischaracterized as a party. The panel also recommended expunging the reason for his termination from his record.

title: 50 seconds of terror: Lucknow property dealer shot point blank in broad daylight
content: A 35-year-old property dealer, Sandeep Singh, was brutally shot dead in a busy Lucknow market. CCTV footage shows two bikeborne assailants firing repeatedly at close range, even after the victim collapsed. The attackers, with a faulty number plate, fled the scene. Police are investigating the planned execution.

title: Sooryavanshi 'doesn't give a damn about any bowler': Jurel reveals mantra
content: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's explosive 97 off 29 balls powered Rajasthan Royals to a 47-run victory over Sunrisers Hyderabad in the IPL 2026 Eliminator. Teammate Dhruv Jurel revealed the 15-year-old's fearless approach, emphasizing his focus solely on the ball, not the bowler. This win propels RR closer to the IPL title.

title: Shampoo, sacks and more: How is Middle East conflict making your groceries costlier?
content: Your daily essentials, from shampoo to biscuits, are set to become pricier.  A global conflict is driving up raw material costs, forcing companies to hike prices by 3-7% and potentially reduce product sizes.  Expect further increases in food, beverage, and personal care items as businesses grapple with soaring input expenses.

title: Four lines that 'layoff email' from Meta Leadership has for those on H-1B visa
content: Meta has initiated another round of significant layoffs, impacting nearly 8,000 employees globally, with notifications starting in Singapore. While many are let go, over 7,000 will transition to AI initiatives. The company is providing immigration guidance and severance packages, including 16 weeks' pay plus two weeks per service year, and 18 months of COBRA coverage for affected staff.

title: Ashwin fumes at SRH collapse, asks 'management to think' Head’s future
content: R Ashwin lambasted Sunrisers Hyderabad's reckless batting in their IPL Eliminator loss, particularly criticizing Ishan Kishan's unnecessary shot and Travis Head's overall season. Ashwin suggested SRH management must re-evaluate Head's future, stating a lack of game awareness cost them a winnable chase against Rajasthan Royals.

title: CBSE exam discrepancy claims: Pradhan issues clarification, takes swipe at Rahul
content: Union Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan addressed concerns over CBSE Class 12 evaluation discrepancies, assuring no one would be spared if irregularities are found. He criticized Rahul Gandhi's frustration over electoral defeats, accusing him of opposing India's scientific progress. Pradhan emphasized the government's commitment to student well-being and transparency in the digital evaluation system.

title: Months after Dell CEOdonated $6.25 billion to Trump Accounts, company gets $9.7 billion Pentagon deal
content: Months after Michael and Susan Dell's $6.25 billion donation to seed children's "Trump accounts," Dell Technologies secured a $9.7 billion contract with the US Department of Defense for enterprise software. This five-year deal, aimed at consolidating licensing and saving millions annually, followed a competitive evaluation process.

title: 'Verbal abuse, misogyny': TMC MP Kakoli writes to Om Birla against party MP Kalyan Banerjee
content: Trinamool Congress MP Kakoli Ghosh Dastidar has lodged a formal complaint with Lok Sabha Speaker Om Birla against party MP Kalyan Banerjee, accusing him of repeated verbal abuse within Parliament. This complaint follows Dastidar's recent resignations from key party posts and public criticism of the TMC's leadership and political consultancy firm I-PAC after the party's electoral performance.

title: Djokovic hits out at Paris crowd: 'Won't play any more French players'
content: After conquering French talent Valentin Royer in a challenging four-set encounter, Novak Djokovic voiced his discontent with the Ville de Paris crowd, who booed him during the match. He revealed a desire to steer clear of facing any more French competitors after also besting one in the first round at Roland Garros.

title: Dark seas, floating drug bags, foreign smugglers: Inside Gujarat’s biggest cocaine bust
content: Gujarat ATS and Coast Guard seized 115kg of cocaine worth Rs 1,150 crore from a cargo vessel near Mundra port, a major maritime anti-narcotics operation. Three foreign nationals were arrested, while one Tanzanian national is feared drowned after jumping into the sea. The drugs originated in Brazil and were destined for Delhi.

title: Watch: Kavya Maran greets Vaibhav Sooryavanshi after SRH exit IPL 2026
content: Kavya Maran’s post-match greeting for Vaibhav Sooryavanshi went viral after Rajasthan Royals defeated Sunrisers Hyderabad by 47 runs in the IPL 2026 Eliminator. The 15-year-old smashed 97 off 29 balls with 12 sixes, helping RR post 243/8. Jofra Archer starred with the ball as SRH were bowled out for 196. Rajasthan Royals now face Gujarat Titans in Qualifier 2.

title: Man posted image of dog sitting on Indian flag; Allahabad HC grants bail — here’s why
content: The Allahabad High Court made headlines by granting bail to a man accused of an unsettling social media post featuring the Indian flag alongside a dog. The judges remarked on the unreasonably lengthy delays in his trial process and argued that holding someone without conviction is counterintuitive to justice.

title: Where do you bowl to Sooryavanshi? Archer’s hilarious reply goes viral
content: Jofra Archer humorously dodged questions about his bowling strategy against teenage sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi following Rajasthan Royals' dominant IPL Eliminator win. Sooryavanshi's explosive 97 off 29 balls powered RR to 243/8, while Archer's devastating spell dismantled SRH's chase, securing a 47-run victory.

title: ‘God’ in contact list: CBI uncovers chilling WhatsApp trail in NEET-UG leak probe
content: In a notable crackdown, the Central Bureau of Investigation detained a paediatrician from Latur and a physics teacher from Pune linked to the NEET-UG 2026 examination leak. This surge in arrests now totals 13 individuals. Investigators revealed a web of WhatsApp communications and financial exchanges indicating that the leaked physics questions were sold to affluent families for substantial payments.

title: Honey Singh reveals he wears a wig, as heavy medication made him bald
content: In a candid revelation, Yo Yo Honey Singh shares his tumultuous experience with bipolar disorder, which resulted in total hair loss due to extensive medication, leading him to don a wig. He recounts a seven-year phase of seclusion, distancing himself from the public eye after a notable incident. Read on to know more in detail.

title: Eid-ul-Adha: Top 100 wishes and quotes for Bakrid
content: Navigating the flurry of Eid-ul-Adha greetings can be overwhelming. This guide offers 115 ready-to-use messages, from heartfelt family wishes and foodie friend prompts to professional greetings and quick replies.

title: Kuwait under missile, drone attack after US strikes Iran; what happened at Bandar Abbas?
content: In a dramatic turn of events, Kuwait's air defense forces successfully neutralized incoming missile and drone threats, reflecting the heightened tensions between the US and Iran. This incident unfolds in the wake of Iran's announcement about attacking a US airbase, a reaction to previous American strikes near Bandar Abbas where four Iranian drones met their demise.

title: Sooryavanshi touches Gavaskar’s feet, then smashes 97 vs SRH - Watch
content: Teenage batting sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi impressed on and off the field during IPL 2026. He touched Sunil Gavaskar's feet before an Eliminator match and later smashed a blistering 97 off 29 balls, powering Rajasthan Royals to a 47-run victory.

title: Russia's renewed missile blitz on Kyiv: The Oreshnik factor and the future of the Ukraine war
content: Russia's latest missile and drone assault on Kyiv, featuring the hypersonic Oreshnik, signals a dangerous escalation. Moscow aims to break Ukraine's resilience and psychologically pressure the West. The attacks target Kyiv as the political heart, overload air defenses, and serve as geopolitical signaling, demonstrating Russia's strategic strike capabilities and readiness for a prolonged conflict.

title: Three months of Hormuz chaos: Oil prices jump 3% amid US-Iran standoff
content: Oil prices saw a dip as hopes for a US-Iran deal to ease Middle East tensions and reopen the Strait of Hormuz emerged. Despite earlier drops, crude prices are recovering slightly. President Trump emphasized his focus on preventing Iran's nuclear ambitions and ensuring the Strait's accessibility, warning against interference.

title: 'Haters will say you're not 15': Sooryavanshi turns heads with record knock
content: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi’s stunning IPL 2026 season continued with a blistering 97 off 29 balls against SRH, including 12 sixes. The 15-year-old broke Chris Gayle’s record for most sixes in a T20 tournament. Cricket legends Sachin Tendulkar, Andre Russell, Yuvraj Singh and Mohammed Kaif praised the RR star, who now has 680 runs and multiple IPL records this season.

title: Filmmaker Kunal Kohli says Ranveer Singh is going to give a flop again
content: Filmmaker Kunal Kohli strongly defends Ranveer Singh, urging audiences to look beyond box office numbers. He emphasizes that every actor faces hits and flops, and setbacks don't define a performer's talent. Kohli highlighted Singh's brilliant performances even in films that didn't succeed, advocating for a more nuanced view of stardom and failure. Read on to know more in detail.

title: 2 suspected Ebola cases trigger airport surveillance, quarantine measures across nation
content: Following reports of suspected Ebola infections in Bengaluru and Gujarat, Indian health officials have intensified surveillance at airports and introduced stringent quarantine measures. A Ugandan woman has fortunately tested negative in Bengaluru, while a 37-year-old man in Gujarat is currently being watched closely after traveling from Africa and Bangladesh.

title: Karnataka CM power play: DKS sought Priyanka’s help after no green signal from Rahul
content: D.K. Shivakumar's bid for the Chief Minister post gained traction after Priyanka Gandhi Vadra intervened, persuading Rahul and Sonia Gandhi. Siddaramaiah reportedly conveyed his decision to resign, though he is hesitant about a national role. A press conference is expected before his resignation, with Shivakumar attending a breakfast meeting.

title: Quote of the day by Steven Spielberg
content: Filmmaker Steven Spielberg shared a crucial distinction between conscience and intuition during a Harvard commencement address. He explained that while conscience shouts what you 'should' do, intuition whispers what you 'could' do. Spielberg emphasized that listening to this inner whisper is key to defining one's character and unlocking potential.

title: Exclusive: IPL chairman opens up on honey-trap concerns, calls it 'very clean tournament'
content: IPL governing council chairman Arun Dhumal distanced himself from speculation surrounding BCCI secretary Devajit Saikia's 'honey-trap' remark, saying no such incident had surfaced during IPL 2026 and described the tournament as a 'very clean' season.

title: Hormuz standoff: Trump's 'will blow them up' warning to Oman amid fragile Iran-US talks
content: Speaking to reporters during a cabinet meeting at the White House on Wednesday local time, Trump rejected the idea of any temporary arrangement that would allow Iran and Oman to jointly manage the strait. "No, the strait's going to be open to everybody," Trump said when asked whether he would support such a deal. Calling it an international passage, the US President stressed that no country would be allowed to dominate it.

title: Mamata Banerjee lambasts rebels with 'Girgiti' poem after Bengal poll rout
content: Facing internal dissent after a poll setback, Mamata Banerjee penned a poem, 'Girgiti (Chameleon),' targeting rebel leaders. The verses accuse them of changing character for personal gain and warn of consequences. This comes as several leaders resign from posts, citing 'VVIP culture' and leadership failures amid controversies, intensifying the party's crisis.

title: Several feared dead as boat carrying 14 capsizes in Ganga near Patna; 2 bodies found
content: A boat carrying approximately 14 people capsized in the Ganga river near Barh, Patna, due to strong winds. Two bodies have been recovered, and five individuals are still missing. Rescue operations are underway to find the remaining passengers.

title: After 17 state budgets and 2 CM terms, Siddaramaiah stares at toughest political decision
content: As Karnataka approaches a new political era, the esteemed Chief Minister Siddaramaiah stands on the brink of retirement, leaving behind a legacy that includes crafting 17 state budgets and championing the rights of marginalized groups. His two-decade journey has not only redefined welfare policies but also solidified the Congress party's influence in the state's politics.

title: KCET 2026 result date: When will KEA release UGCET scorecards?
content: Karnataka Common Entrance Test (KCET) 2026 results are expected soon on cetonline.karnataka.gov.in, likely after June 1st. Over 3.3 lakh candidates can check their scorecards online using application number and name. The exam, held April 22-24, had no negative marking. Students must upload marks for result preparation. A rank list and subsequent admission process will follow.

title: ‘Pre-trial detention can’t be indefinite’: Allahabad HC grants bail in pro-Pak post case
content: The Allahabad High Court granted bail to Tahir Mewati, accused of posting anti-India and pro-Pakistan content online. The court emphasized that pre-trial detention cannot be indefinite, even for grave charges, upholding constitutional rights. Mewati, in jail since May 2025, claims false implication and a fake social media account.

title: Twisha Sharma death: CBI may take mother-in-law in custody after HC scraps bail
content: The Madhya Pradesh High Court has revoked the anticipatory bail granted to Giribala Singh, mother-in-law of deceased Twisha Sharma. The court found that the trial court failed to consider crucial evidence, including witness statements and postmortem findings, when granting the bail. The CBI is expected to take Singh into custody for further investigation into allegations of cruelty and dowry.

title: Madness in Mullanpur: Sooryavanshi's 97 was not power-hitting alone, it was...
content: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi produced an innings that felt like a glimpse into cricket's future, smashing 97 off just 29 balls in the IPL Eliminator, leaving Sunrisers Hyderabad with no answers. Though he fell three runs short of a record-breaking century, the 15-year-old's fearless strokeplay, tactical maturity and breathtaking power ensured Mullanpur witnessed an innings that may live forever in IPL folklore.

title: Historic for India! Praggnanandhaa shocks Magnus Carlsen in Norway; 3rd win for Divya
content: India's R Praggnanandhaa scripted a sensational repeat of history at the Norway Chess tournament in Oslo, stunning local hero and World No. 1 Magnus Carlsen in a 62-move classical encounter. Meanwhile, debutante Divya Deshmukh continued her dream run in the women's section, defeating tournament leader Bibisara Assaubayeva to secure her third consecutive Armageddon victory.

title: Taylor Swift suffers shocking AMA loss ahead of wedding to Travis Kelce
content: Taylor Swift experienced an unexpected setback after failing to secure any wins despite entering a major music event with the highest number of nominations. The outcome sparked widespread discussion among fans online, with some questioning the results while others argued the singer has already achieved more than enough success to cement her legacy. Meanwhile, supporters and critics continued debating the surprising development.

title: Art in conflict zones: Nicky Chandam’s visual documentation of Manipur and the politics of performance
content: Manipur-based Nicky Chandam’s photography exhibition in Chennai takes viewers deep into the world of stage performances, where fleeting emotions unfold into many stories.

title: Karnataka Chief Minister Siddaramaiah announces decision to step down at breakfast meeting with Ministers
content: While sharing his decision to step down, the Chief Minister informed the Cabinet that he had been asked to do so by the Congress High Command

title: Speculation over, Karnataka Chief Minister Siddaramaiah announces decision to step down
content: While sharing his decision to step down, Chief Minister Siddaramaiah informed the Cabinet that he had been asked to do so by the Congress High Command.

title: Karnataka politics LIVE: Karnataka Chief Minister Siddaramaiah announces decision to step down at breakfast meeting with Ministers
content: According to the CMO, Siddaramaiah is set to visit the Governor’s office Lok Bhavan at 2.30 p.m. He will address a press conference thereafter at 3 p.m.

title: 8 arrested for attack on ED officials’ vehicle after raid at ex-Kerala CM Pinarayi’s residence
content: State Police Chief Ravada A. Chandrasekhar says investigation is on the right track and that more people involved in the violence have been identified

title: Naidu seeks Bharat Ratna for N.T. Rama Rao at Mahanadu
content: Paying tribute on N.T. Rama Rao’s birth anniversary, the Chief Minister says the TDP founder deserves the country’s highest civilian honour

title: TMC’s Kakoli Ghosh Dastidar accuses party MP Kalyan Banerjee of verbal abuse, misogyny
content: Kakoli Ghosh Dastidar’s letter says the misogyny has been against many lady members and needs to be punished

title: BJP bets on Jat Sikh card with Dhillon’s appointment as Punjab chief
content: The saffron party has historically struggled to make inroads in Punjab, but has lately been aggressively building its campaign momentum to gain a foothold in the border State

title: India, China hold 'constructive' talks on LAC; agree border peace key to normalising ties
content: The two sides also agreed to work together to make "substantive preparation" for the next meeting of the Special Representatives (SR) which is to be held in China

title: Telangana Transport Minister flags off 60 EV buses, says TGSRTC merger process will begin after union elections
content: Representatives of recognised unions and officials to begin TGSRTC merger process after elections for recognised unions

title: Tamil Nadu govt. to file curative petition against youngster’s acquittal from 2017 Mugalivakkam child sexual assault-cum-murder case
content: Justices G.R. Swaminathan and V. Lakshminarayanan close a writ petition after recording the submission

title: Govt. would be responsible if I suffer health issues during fast under blazing sun, says Manoj Jarange
content: Activist Manoj Jarange has accused the government of filing false cases against Maratha youths and questioned the ‘delay’ in providing jobs to families of those who "sacrificed" their lives during the agitation

title: Velankanni-bound tourist bus overturns near Nellore, 16 injured
content: A private bus carrying 43 pilgrims to Velankanni hit a highway railing and overturned near Chintareddypalem; three of the injured are serious

title: Sold twice, raped multiple times, tribal girl trafficked from Odisha narrates ordeal
content: Odisha police launch investigation after the girl who escaped from Jhansi district of Uttar Pradesh file a formal complaint

title: Two Indian peacekeepers to be honoured posthumously on International Peacekeepers Day
content: Nearly 180 Indian peacekeepers have made the supreme sacrifice in the line of duty, the highest number by far from any troop-contributing country

title: AMMA to hear actor Ansiba Hassan as she calls for ‘independent, unbiased’ panel
content: Ansiba Hassan has accused Tini Tom and a section of AMMA office-bearers of subjecting her to character assassination and making communal remarks against her

title: Tamil Nadu’s rights of utmost importance, never said will surrender that: Higher Education Minister
content: He was responding to a controversy stoked by his statement in Madurai on Wednesday that the new government need not follow the policies of the previous government, particularly with regard to the Chief Minister serving as the Chancellor of universities

title: T.N. Higher Education Minister says CM need not be Chancellor of universities; DMK, VCK criticise remark
content: During his visit to Madurai, the Minister had stated that the present TVK-led government should not find it imperative to stick to the stand taken by the previous DMK government that the Chief Minister alone should be the Chancellor of State-run universities

title: Women-led solar power plant inaugurated in Telangana’s Khammam; ₹4.5 lakh-₹5 lakh monthly income estimated
content: Telangana government intends to establish similar solar power plants in every district, says Deputy CM and Power Minister Mallu Bhatti Vikramarka

title: Rest still a favour, not a right, for retail-staff in Chennai
content: Five years after Tamil Nadu legislated on the ‘right to sit’ provision within the Tamil Nadu Shops and Establishments Act, 1947, the law remains a luxury for many. From high-end coffee shops to bustling textile showrooms, Chennai’s retail workers continue to trade their long-term health for long shifts on their feet

title: Tussle for the top spot in Karnataka: A timeline
content: A mass leader with strong rural connect, Siddaramaiah’s second stint as CM of Karnataka was marked by controversies and internal dissidence.

title: Siddaramaiah, Nitish Kumar and the final bow of their socialist politics
content: What the historic arc of both Nitish Kumar's and Siddaramaiah’s careers shows is the current decline of the socialist strain in the Indian political firmament

title: Tamil Nadu CM Vijay calls on PM Modi at New Delhi; discusses Mekedatu, fishermen issues
content: Mr. Vijay urged the Prime Minister to direct the Union Home Ministry to issue a clarification permitting the respective State invocation songs to be sung at the beginning of all government events.

title: Union Minister Dharmendra Pradhan takes responsibility for CBSE OSM discrepancies, assures strict action against guilty
content: Pradhan hit at out at Congress leader Rahul Gandhi, saying he was “frustrated” and “opposed” to technological progress

title: Andhra Pradesh officials say Odisha blocking census collection in Kotia villages
content: Tribal Welfare Minister Gummadi Sandhya Rani has asked Chief Minister N. Chandrababu Naidu to protect the people of the disputed Kotia villages, where Odisha officials have reportedly stopped Andhra Pradesh staff from collecting census data

title: Emotional scenes as Abdul Rahim arrives home in Kerala after serving 20-year jail term in Saudi
content: A native of Kodampuzha in Kozhikode district of Kerala, Abdul Rahim was imprisoned and sentenced to death in 2006 for the murder of 14-year-old differently abled son of his employer. His jail term ended on May 19

title: Ban cow slaughter in Tamil Nadu with immediate effect, orders Madras High Court
content: Judges say, goats and sheep too should not be allowed to be slaughtered in any place other than a licensed slaughter house

title: Strict vigil across U.P. on Bakrid, police conduct flag march, foot patrols in sensitive districts
content: Special security arrangements are likely to be put in place in districts such as Sambhal, Meerut, Saharanpur, Rampur, Moradabad, Aligarh, Bareilly, Bahraich, Varanasi and Ayodhya

title: ANC seizes drugs worth over ₹50 crore from Mumbai flat, three held
content: According to the police, the raid was carried out on May 26 at Yasmeen Tower, a high-rise building in Agripada, South Mumbai

title: Vacant plots, dilapidated housing societies inspected for LIG houses in and around Hyderabad
content: Housing Minister says Telangana government decided to continue allotment of houses to poor who are eligible and do not have their own land next year too

title: Former AIADMK Minister Vellamandi Natarajan joins TVK
content: “After the election, the AIADMK split into two. All of this is not right. As far as the TVK is concerned, they have accepted all our leaders, including Periyar, Anna, MGR, and Jayalalithaa. That is why I have come and joined here,” he told The Hindu

title: International experts ‘satisfied’ with Polavaram project work pace, quality
content: A three-day review by international expert Sean Hinchberger began on Wednesday; the team said earlier technical recommendations on the project had been carried out

title: Haryana Congress panel meets to chalk out strategy on SIR
content: The meeting was attended by HPCC president Rao Narendra Singh, former Haryana Chief Minister and Leader of Opposition Bhupinder Singh Hooda, among other party leaders

title: In pictures | India celebrates Id-ul-Adha
content: From Festive gatherings to bustling market places, to sharing meals, to charity and community celebrations, a look at how India is celebrating Id

title: CPI(M) condemns ED raids on Pinarayi Vijayan, calls for protests in Andhra Pradesh
content: State secretary V. Srinivasa Rao says the ED is being used to target opposition leaders, and asks party cadres to hold protests across A.P. against the Centre

title: JSW Group commences construction of mega steel project in Odisha
content: The new steel plant is coming up at the place where South Korean steel major POSCO had once proposed a mega project

title: CM Vijay’s signature suit: Has Tamil Nadu’s new Chief Minister sparked a blazer trend?
content: From T Nagar clothing stores to custom tailoring studios, we explore whether Chief Minister C Joseph Vijay’s black suit has inspired a new fashion trend in Tamil Nadu, and how much it costs to recreate his look

title: MVA to contest on all 17 seats, Mahayuti differences continue
content: CM Fadnavis met Union Home Minister Amit Shah in Delhi after the State leaders attended a high-level review meeting chaired by Mr Shah about sugarcane and onion farmers.

title: U.S. military strikes another alleged drug boat in eastern Pacific, killing two
content: U.S. Southern Command posted a video on social media showing a boat resting on the water before being struck by an explosion

title: Amid leadership change developments, Karnataka Chief Minister Siddaramaiah receives caste survey report
content: This gains particular significance in light of Siddaramaiah’s legacy as a tall leader of the OBC bloc, and the report being viewed as part of his legacy

title: ED freezes ₹18.36 crore and 242 bank accounts in Exalogic-CMRL pay-off case
content: Simultaneous raids were conducted across 10 locations in Kerala and Bengaluru on Wednesday. Raids yielded documents pertaining to investments and fixed deposits in banks, say ED sources

title: Karnataka CM Siddaramaiah to address speculation on power transition on May 28
content: Party sources indicated that the Congress Legislative Party meeting, where the likely successor of Mr. Siddaramaiah could be named or elected, is likely to held on May 28.

title: Fuel price hike: Private schools in Bengaluru plan to increase transport fee
content: Parents of school-going children, already burdened by rising fuel prices, said a hike in the school transport fee would strain their budgets further

title: Morning flights from Bengaluru to Kalaburagi by Star Air starting June 10
content: The timing was changed following representations made by the Kalyana Karnataka Chamber of Commerce and Industry (KKCCI)

title: Jamiat chief says do not sacrifice prohibited animals, avoid sharing slaughter photos on social media
content: Former Vice-President Hamid Ansari also appealed to Muslims not to slaughter cows during Id-ul-Fitr and urged the Centre to heed the Jamiat chief's suggestion to declare the cow as the national animal

title: Id prayers disallowed at Srinagar's Jama Masjid for eighth year in a row
content: Mirwaiz Umar Farooq said it is very unfortunate that children in Kashmir are growing up without witnessing the spiritually uplifting Id prayers at the Eidgah

title: Bihar cabinet approves ‘cashless treatment’ for MLAs, government officials, employees and pensioners
content: The cabinet also approved the framing of “Bihar Ryot Land Purchase Policy 2026”, as per which land can be acquired based on mutual talks/coordination/consent from the ryots for various projects of both the central and state governments.

title: Annapurna Yojana: How to enrol in West Bengal’s new cash aid scheme for women
content: Under the Annapura Yojana scheme, women will receive ₹3,000 per month. The existing Lakshmir Bhandar scheme will continue until the new programme is fully implemented

content: Weather Updates Today, Heatwave, IMD Alert LIVE Updates: Light to very light rain is expected during the afternoon and evening, accompanied by strong winds and squalls reaching speeds of 50-60 kmph.

title: Opinion: Opinion | Karnataka Tussle: Is This Where Congress Finally Understands The Value Of 'Timing'?
content: For years, Rahul Gandhi's critics have accused him of being a moral commentator rather than a commander. Karnataka may be a rebuttal to that charge.

title: Probe Into Pinarayi Vijayan's Daughter's Firm, Dealings Widens Amid Protests
